messages.label: error

exceptions.message:
Livewire encountered a missing root tag when trying to render a component. 
 When rendering a Blade view, make sure it contains a root HTML tag.

statements.sql: select MONTH(created_at) as month, COUNT(*) as customer_count from `users` where year(`created_at`) = 2026 and `role` = 'user' group by MONTH(created_at) order by `month` asc
